summary: Captured approved Secure Cloud RunPod remote engine direction.
Attached large adaptive plan and preserved investigation notes.
Plan review: added verified local-coupling inventory and closed gaps (transport topology, template distribution, input-asset transfer, remote model installs, crash watchdog, secret hygiene).

Moved card todo->doing on branch RunPod. Completed Phase 1 (Contract and Manifest Design): wrote 6 research decision docs via parallel agents — transport-topology, wrapper-api-contract, template-distribution, volume-manifest-schema, pod-lifecycle-policy, secret-storage.

Phase 1 decisions resolved with user (secret=Option B encrypted-file fallback + save-time warn, MpiInput password mode; stop-on-quit + first-class volume delete for GPU/datacenter switch; watchdog 15min inference/12min future LoRA; no Connect button - Settings RunPod master toggle + advisory pop-up, Pod starts at existing comfy:ready trigger). Phase 2 step 1 DONE: Python/FastAPI wrapper prototype at c:/AI/Mpi/cubric-remote-wrapper, verify.py 12/12 PASS (token gate HTTP+WS, binary preview frame intact, progress relay, synthesized model-init x2, upload+traversal guard). Wrapper runtime=Python (OneTrainer precedent), home=private mpi-ci, image=public GHCR.

Decisions: build image locally (Docker Desktop) + add mpi-ci to workspace. Cloned MadPonyInteractive/mpi-ci to c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci. Authored Pod image at mpi-ci/cubric-vision-pod/ (Dockerfile: runpod/pytorch base + ComfyUI + wrapper, manifest-stamped build args; start.sh: ComfyUI loopback 8188 --preview-method taesd --input-directory on volume + wrapper public 8889, fail-closed on missing CUBRIC_TOKEN; wrapper/ copied from prototype). New GHCR workflow cubric-vision-pod-image.yml (workflow_dispatch, packages:write, pushes ghcr.io/madponyinteractive/cubric-vision-pod:v<manifest>). Both workflows YAML-valid. PENDING USER: install Docker Desktop (WSL2, AMD64) for local build.

Docker Desktop installed (engine v29.5.3 linux/x86_64). Built cubric-vision-pod:dev locally - image builds clean (runpod/pytorch base + ComfyUI + wrapper). Smoke test: wrapper boots in container, /health 200, auth 401, input dir set correctly. ComfyUI crashes on no-NVIDIA-driver as expected (host has no GPU passthrough) - validates start.sh, full generation needs a live GPU Pod. Image proven structurally sound; ready for GHCR push + RunPod template (Phase 2 step 2).

Pod image pushed to GHCR: ghcr.io/madponyinteractive/cubric-vision-pod:v0.1.0 (digest sha256:ac22d710...). PENDING USER: make GHCR package public (RunPod needs public pull), move Docker data root to D: (reclaim ~30GB C), paste existing RunPod Key1 R&W into gitignored .secrets/runpod.env. Volume decisions: 150GB (WAN=78GB, real dev use not throwaway), GPU RTX 5090 real inference / A6000 cheap test, network volume DC MUST be 5090-capable Secure Cloud (volume locks to one DC).

GHCR image public + anon pull verified (HTTP 200). RunPod key valid (REST /pods 200). KEY FINDING: GPU availability IS fetchable via GraphQL dataCenters{gpuAvailability{available gpuTypeId stockStatus}} - stockStatus High/Medium/Low/null; available=deploy gate, stockStatus=likelihood hint, null!=unavailable. Wrote research/gpu-availability-and-datacenter.md (app gates GPU picker on stock, beats OneTrainer link-only). DC=EUR-IS-1 (user-confirmed: 5090+A4000+L4, storage=true). Created 150GB volume cubric-vision-vol id=cfwqthmdrg in EUR-IS-1. Created template cubric-vision-pod-v0.1.0 id=ejrwtsej15 (image ghcr public, port 8889/http only, mount /workspace). Ready for live Pod deploy (Phase 2 step 2-3).

LIVE END-TO-END PASS on real RunPod A4000 Pod (id k8pr35yto3xy7n, EUR-IS-1, template ejrwtsej15, volume cfwqthmdrg). GHCR public image pulled (digest ac22d710 matches push), ComfyUI loaded on real GPU (comfy_ready:true), wrapper reachable via https://[pod]-8889.proxy.runpod.net. Remote token auth verified: wrong/no token->401, right token->200. Upload landed file on network volume /workspace/comfyui/input/ (persists). Pod stopped after test (EXITED, ~$0.04 GPU). FINDINGS: (1) Windows curl flakes on POST-multipart through Cloudflare proxy (http=000) - use python+browser-UA for remote tests; (2) RunPod proxy is behind Cloudflare, default urllib UA gets 403 error 1010, must send browser User-Agent. Phase 2 steps 2+3 effectively DONE.

Full wrapper contract implemented + 24/24 verify PASS (local, fake_comfy stub). Added all remaining endpoints: /wrapper/prompt (+_cubric_bundle_version 409 gate), /wrapper/view (auth'd streaming output fetch), /wrapper/interrupt, /wrapper/queue, /wrapper/upload/image (forwards to ComfyUI), /wrapper/upload/latent, /wrapper/models/status (volume isCompleteOnDisk mirror), /wrapper/manifest, /wrapper/events/stream (SSE model-init), plus 15-min idle watchdog (self-stops Pod via RunPod REST, suppressed during active generation) and consistent error envelope. Synced to mpi-ci/cubric-vision-pod/wrapper, rebuilt image (wrapper layer only, base cached), pushing updated v0.1.0 to GHCR.

Updated full-contract image push to GHCR blocked by transient GHCR 502 outage (GitHub-side, token endpoint also 502). Original live-tested v0.1.0 still on GHCR. RETRY PENDING: docker push ghcr.io/madponyinteractive/cubric-vision-pod:v0.1.0 when GHCR recovers. Not a blocker for app-side work. Starting Parallel Batch item 1 (backend RunPod client + safeStorage secret store) inline-sequential per CLAUDE.md.

Parallel Batch #1 DONE (backend RunPod client + secret store), inline-sequential. NEW: main/secretsStore.js (safeStorage + AES-256-GCM derived-key fallback + weakEncryption flag, fork bridge, secrets:* IPC), routes/runpodRemote.js (REST+GraphQL client: validate/availability/pods CRUD/volumes/templates), routes/remoteEngine.js (fork-bridge key resolver, wrapper-token gen, stale-payload-tolerant readiness poll). WIRED: server.js mounts 2 routers, main.js imports safeStorage+secretsStore, registers fork bridge after fork + secrets IPC. SECURITY: caught + fixed a real key leak (GraphQL key was in URL -> would hit err.message -> app.log -> bug report); moved to Authorization header + added redactSecret (api_key=/rpa_/Bearer). Verified: secretsStore round-trip (fallback path), mocked client end-to-end, secret-hygiene grep clean, graphql header-auth confirmed LIVE (47 gpuTypes). No core ComfyUI files touched. Not committed.

Parallel Batch #2 IMPLEMENTED (Comfy boundary adapter), inline-sequential. NEW: js/services/remoteEngineClient.js (narrow renderer adapter: refresh/isRemote/httpBase/wsUrl; token in-memory only), routes/remoteProxy.js (backend-owned remote-mode state, /remote/mode|ws-token|comfy/status, /proxy/prompt|view|interrupt|queue|upload/image forwards with Bearer+browser-UA, /comfy/events/stream SSE intercept with next() fall-through). EDITED: comfyController.js (httpBase() seam replaces hardcoded http://serverAddress templates; _ensureRemoteReady branch; WS URL via remoteEngineClient.wsUrl fallback to local), commandExecutor.js (view URL via httpBase), server.js (mount remoteProxy BEFORE comfy for intercept). Local mode byte-identical: _active=false -> httpBase()=http://127.0.0.1:8188, wsUrl()=null; only delta = one loopback GET /remote/mode per ensureServerRunning. Verified: eslint clean, node --check, 19/19 mocked-router test PASS (auth header, UA, 409/422/503 guards, SSE fall-through + relay, view streaming, no token leak). memoryOps.js local VRAM unload intentionally untouched. mpi_comfy_url retirement deferred to Batch #3 (Settings ownership). Not committed. Pending user npm start verification.

Parallel Batch #2 VERIFIED by user: npm start, full local SDXL t2i generation end-to-end byte-identical (progress, previews, output saved), console clean, and GET /remote/mode returned {active:false,podId:null} as designed. Plan box ticked; 5 file claims set to complete. Next: Parallel Batch #3 (Settings RunPod section + master toggle + boot gate) or Batch #4 / Phase 3 per user choice.

Parallel Batch #3 IMPLEMENTED (Settings RunPod section + remote boot gate), inline-sequential. NEW: js/core/secretsClient.js (sole renderer secrets:* IPC wrapper, write-only key, browser-safe fallbacks). EDITED: storageKeys.js+storage.js (RUNPOD_CONFIG non-secret prefs, normalized; removed dead mpi_comfy_url + getComfyUrl/setComfyUrl), state.js (runpodConfig key + localStorage mirror subscriber), MpiSettings.js+css (RunPod section: master toggle off-default, password API-key field with Save/Clear + save-time weakEncryption warning + auto-validate, DC picker storageSupport-filtered, GPU picker Secure-Cloud-only stock-sorted with High/Medium/Low/unrated meta, volume/pod id inputs, /remote/mode push; removed dead ComfyUI API URL field), shell.js (_bootApp remote gate skips local engine version/install gate when enabled, _initRemoteBoot pushes mode + advisory pop-up via showError, auto-start skipped in remote mode until Phase 4 Pod start). Reused existing primitives only (MpiCheckbox/MpiInput password/MpiButton/MpiDropdown meta). eslint clean. Pending user npm start verification.

Batch #3.1 polish after user feedback + screenshots. (1) ComfyUI API URL stays removed per user decision; created docs/releases/UNRELEASED.md pending-notes scratchpad with importantChanges entry (field was dead config, tutorial mention obsolete) — fold in at next /mpi-version-bump. (2) GPU picker: console screenshots proved GraphQL available:true passes cards the console shows N/A — stock now leads the dropdown meta (was truncated to invisibility), null labeled N/A matching console, N/A sorted last. (3) NEW GET /runpod/volumes (client.listVolumes); Settings loads account volumes: volume field becomes dropdown of real volumes (size+DC meta), DC options annotated with-your-volume marker, saved volume auto-adopts its DC, mismatch warning (accent-warn hint) when chosen DC cannot reach selected volume. (4) Volume labeled optional-for-now. eslint+node-check clean. Advisory pop-up VERIFIED by user earlier this turn-set.

Session handoff d3ac7a0f created. Batch #3/#3.1 user-verified (key save+validate, EUR-IS-1 pickers, stock labels match console, advisory pop-up, toggle-off boot unchanged). Plan updated: Batch #3 ticked, NEW UI-polish item (dropdown meta truncation + GPU $/hr), Current State status para, 3 Plan Drift entries. docs/releases/UNRELEASED.md created for the comfy-url removal changelog note. All 13 session file claims completed. Next session: UI polish -> Batch #4 / Phase 3.

detail: securePrice ($/hr) added to gpuTypes query + GPU meta; MpiDropdown forwards extraClasses to portalled list; MpiSettings.css scoped meta stack fixes truncation. User-verified.

Create/list/delete network volume from Settings; existing volumes badged Ready; in-dropdown create-in-DC with size prompt; delete confirm with re-download warning. USER-VERIFIED on real RunPod account (created+deleted, confirmed online). Fixes: DC-change re-renders volume slot so create label tracks DC picker; surfaces RunPod real error (attached-to-Pod 500). Verified delete of cubric-vision-vol 500s because attached to EXITED Pod cubric-vision-test (RunPod constraint, not a bug).

Settings slide-over subscribes to ui:close-all-popups; OverlayManager.request fires it on every modal open, so any pop-up (MpiOkCancel/showError) closes Settings. User wants Settings to stay open under child modals. Deferred (user choice). Fix options: (A) register slide-over on overlay stack via Overlays.request + drop close-all sub (correct, touches global); (B) ignore-close-all-while-child-modal-open flag (targeted). Escape-close currently rides the empty-stack close-all path, so cannot just delete the subscription.

Backend live-verified: A4000 unavailable -> deleted A4000 Pod, created L4 Pod e4s5bxubw4qfy2 (EUR-IS-1, cu124 image, volume cfwqthmdrg); wrapper /health ready on L4 (Design A proven). App cold-start user-confirmed (Pod start after ComfyUI start, Pod stop on app close). Then boot-UX fixes (advisory-gated background start, suppressed fullscreen modal, 6000ms toasts) DONE but UNVERIFIED.
PyTorch/ComfyUI in Docker image, volume = models only (arch-agnostic). Multi-image per CUDA build covers all cards; supersedes volume arch_family reinit gate. volume-manifest-schema.md needs update.
1d24fd4a-3190-42b6-ae0c-fe2cad36dd59 — user napping 2h; Pod stopped, no GPU billing.

USER-VERIFIED end-to-end on live L4 e4s5bxubw4qfy2: advisory-gated background start, no fullscreen modal, starting/ready toasts, Retry/Dismiss failure dialog (garbage podId -> 'pod not found', correct title), quit -> Pod stops (EXITED confirmed via REST). Boot-UX fixes #1-#3 all verified. Fix #3 added this session: remote dispatch moved out of ensureServerRunning try/catch (double ui:error with wrong 'ComfyUI failed to start' title killed); background failure now shows MpiOkCancel Retry/Dismiss re-invoking _startRemoteInBackground.

item: Step 2.1 — orphaned Pod on podId change
detail: stop-active stops the CURRENT configured podId, not the started one; changing podId mid-session orphans the running Pod at quit (watchdog backstop only). Fix planned: _startedPodId in remoteProxy. Also added Phase 4 item: Settings status row + Connect button + Pod recreate/GPU-switch flow + host-pinning lesson (stopped Pod resumes only on its original host; DC-wide stock badge misleading).

routes/remoteProxy.js: _startedPodId recorded on successful start (before wrapper-ready wait), stop-active prefers it over _mode.podId, cleared on successful stop. USER-VERIFIED: started Pod, set garbage podId in Settings, quit -> real Pod EXITED (RunPod console).

LIVE-VERIFIED autonomously (user-authorized): wrapper install/cancel/active endpoints + atomic manifest writes + .part partialBytes; 38/38 local checks; image v0.2.0 pushed (digest 7b8149f5, Dockerfile cache reorder); old Pod deleted, NEW Pod ru3g2fsz5u34ua (L4, EUR-IS-1, v0.2.0, fresh CUBRIC_TOKEN sha8 4bc82fb9, watchdog ENABLED for the first time via RUNPOD_API_KEY env); SDXL_Realistic 6.94GB installed ~4.5min, manifest+model+status survive stop/start; Pod EXITED after. Gotchas: proxy 404s wrapper routes seconds after restart while /health green (retry needed app-side); app dep filename embeds subdir -> Step 4 must split type/filename.

Design A supersession note added: arch_family/cu_build now informational, reinit gates for arch/CUDA/digest withdrawn, compat axis = card-arch vs image CUDA build at GPU-pick/Pod-create; wrapper writes minimal manifest at /workspace/cubric/manifest.json.

summary: dep-cross fix LIVE-VERIFIED on RTX 4000 Ada: I2V respects subject + T2V clean (closes B3); logged model-cache stacking OOM investigation.

note: reuse-prompt bug FIXED + user-verified: op made authoritative before media inject; _isI2V replaced with op-driven _opAcceptsImageInput. Files: promptReuse.js, MpiGalleryBlock.js, MpiGroupHistoryBlock.js. Renderer-only, not committed.

Bug 2 FIXED + user-verified: in-place Finish gallery card now promotes hover video (refreshGroup calls _promoteVideo); GroupHistory viewer bridge added. Files: MpiGalleryGrid.js, MpiGroupHistoryBlock.js.

Bug 4 VERIFIED-OK (verify-only, no fix): project.json stores shared I2V/T2V video duration/quality coherently via single project.shared.video bucket keyed by mediaType (PromptBoxControls.js:34). Same key on write+read; no per-op orphan; no silent corruption. Bug 4 CLOSED. No code change, no commit.

OPEN-ITEMS.md consolidated register created: all open MPI-64 + connected work swept from plan.md (Phase + Plan Drift), current-architecture.md, checklist, validation, handoff into one categorized list (A engine-drop/OOM recovery, B remote video, C I2V-ignores-image, D model-cache, E custom-node-restart, F Phase3/4/5 checkboxes, G cosmetic, H residual, I hygiene, J Bug B). Pointers added to plan.md Plan Drift header + current-architecture.md header. Future sessions read OPEN-ITEMS.md first.

FULLY PASS live: drop (stop Pod mid-T2V) -> IDLE.DISCONNECTED status + REMOTE.DISCONNECTED hero + ui:warning toast + gen ended, no false local, no relaunch. Recovery (manual Connect) -> L4 warm-resume host-pinned -> recreate-fallback out-of-stock clear msg -> RTX 2000 Ada fresh create 201 -> ready -> REMOTE.ONLINE + IDLE.Remote + models 1/7 persisted across L4->2000Ada GPU switch. ~30s display lag = H1 residual. 3 renderer files (shell.js, heroStats.js, statusBar.js).

Remote Wan 2.2 T2V (320x176,1s) end-to-end on fresh-volume v0.4.0-cu124 L4: multi-stage, latent preview frames, saved+played. RAM peak 92% (53.68/57.74GiB) at VAE decode, no OOM, VRAM 14%. Confirms RAM-is-the-wall; this L4 cap marginal even for minimal T2V. I2V remote still blocked on B1.

item: G4 aria2c + G5 volume-delete + F8 delete-on-quit
note: G4 aria2c: T2V install burst ~31GB in seconds then tail = multi-connection signature, clean install. G5: current volume deleted clean, no attached error, state self-healed to None/stopped. F8: delete-on-quit -> Pod deleted on quit, action=delete ok=true, volume persists. Also: cu124/cu128 arch routing confirmed (L4/2000Ada=cu124, PRO4500 Blackwell=cu128); Step 4.3 self-heal confirmed.

FAIL: pressing Uninstall in remote mode does nothing - UI unchanged, files still on volume (Wan_22_t2v_High/Low.safetensors present at /workspace/mpi_models/diffusion_models/ after press), NO backend log = delete route never called. /wrapper/models/delete shipped in v0.4.0 but app never calls it. App-side bug, needs diagnosis. Headline MPI-75 G3 feature broken.

Live-session findings logged to OPEN-ITEMS.md sec L: L1 Blackwell PRO4500 create 400 (narrowed Blackwell-specific, L4+2000Ada create 201 clean), L2 createPod error body dropped from log+UI, L3 connect-ETA msg (DOWNGRADED - create-path copy actually good), L4 no remote download-speed readout, L5 status-poll false-negative flicker to local mid-download, L6 remote uninstall does nothing (G3 FAIL).

summary: L6/G3 CLOSED — remote model uninstall PASS live on RTX 5090 Blackwell (Pod dacaf7fa4f7a, vol 14kabihaki, v0.4.0-cu128). Card UNINSTALL -> confirm dialog -> OK -> app.log 'remote uninstall wan-22-t2v: removed 4, kept 3 universal, 0 shared' (success path downloadManager.js:1009) -> Pod terminal: diffusion_models/+vae/+text_encoders/ ALL EMPTY -> UI flipped not-installed + toast. Prior 'did nothing' was unconfirmed 2-step dialog (test artifact), not a code bug.

L1 reclassified to RunPod-side PRO-4500-host constraint (5090 got HTTP 201 same DC/volume/cu128 image, msg 9d976b3b); L2 CLOSED (createPod reject-reason shipped 2c2fb1a, live-confirmed). Folded both into OPEN-ITEMS.md per MPI-75 request.

note: B3 closed: all video workflows + preview nodes converted off NVENC to CreateVideo->SaveVideo (Output_Video/Preview/Output_Audio); 6 ops bumped latestVersion 1.0->1.1 (extend left 1.0, no workflow). comfy_injection.md Preview row updated.

B3 LIVE-VERIFIED: minimal remote i2v_ms on L4 Pod end-to-end - encode (no NVENC) -> SaveVideo captured -> saved+plays+respects subject. M2+M3 PASS. NVENC->SaveVideo conversion proven on a real cloud GPU.

summary: Closed as the RunPod remote-engine epic. Core built + live-verified (remote video SaveVideo, OOM recovery); residue carded MPI-93/94; architecture promoted to docs/runpod-remote-engine.md + memory.
Archived from done to tasks/_archived/MPI-64 (mpi-archive cleanup of oldest completed cards).
